name: Mexican Medley
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Cauliflower flowerettes, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam asparagus and cauliflower for approximately 10 minutes.
2. Combine with celery. Set aside.
3. In a blender, place the beans, filberts, and remaining ingredients.
4. Puree until smooth.
5. Pour this sauce over the asparagus mixture.
6. Serve at room temperature.
